_publications._publicationTitle: Microarray analyses reveal regional astrocyte heterogeneity with implications for neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1)-regulated glial proliferation.

_contextSnippet: Western blot analysis also demonstrated significantly lower levels of neurofibromin expression in CTX astroglial cells than in astroglial cells from the other brain regions
details: Demonstrated significantly lower levels of neurofibromin expression in cortical astroglial cells than in astroglial cells from other brain regions
